matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-network-001 title: associating posts with neighborhoods module: network source pages: 1,3,4 preconditions: post and neighborhood exist in the system. test data: - post id: 1 - neighborhood id: 1 test steps: 1. associate the post with the neighborhood. 2. store the association in the database. 3. retrieve the association from the database. 4. verify the association between post and neighborhood. expected result: 1. association should be created successfully. 2. association should be stored in the database. 3. retrieved association should match the original post and neighborhood.

matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: test data: - user details: id=1, nome="john", cognome="doe", email="john.doe@example.com", photo="http://example.com/photo.jpg" - valid credentials: username="john.doe", password="password123" - invalid credentials: username="invalid.user", password="wrongpassword" test steps: 1. call usercreateprocedure with valid user details. 2. call storeddatadb with "valid credentials" for authorization. 3. call usercreateprocedure with invalid user details. 4. call storeddatadb with "not exist" for authentication. expected result: 1. usercreateprocedure should create a new user entry in storeddatadb. 2. storeddatadb should return authorization success. 3. usercreateprocedure should handle invalid user details gracefully. 4. storeddatadb should return authentication success.
